/usr/bin/ar qc libalpha_project_lib.a CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/dataGestorJSON.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/folder.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/folderGestor.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/home.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/label.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/note.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/noteGestor.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/pdfGestor.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/remeinder.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/reminderGestor.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/schedule.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/settings.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/subject.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/task.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/taskGestor.cc.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_lib.dir/src/user.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libalpha_project_lib.a
